description: Deterministic feature registry — single source of truth for feature selection, mirror graph activation, assistant explanations, pricing composition, and lens language switching.

features.buyer_summary: Automatically verifies material compatibility across your project assemblies, preventing costly clashes before they happen.
features.investor_summary: Deterministic material constraint resolution layer enabling zero-clash assembly pipelines across the platform.
features.engineering_summary: Constraint port binding material compatibility rules to assembly graph nodes. Resolves compatibility matrices against registered material catalogs.
features.admin_summary: Registry mapping: feat-compatibility-engine → cap-material-compatibility → node-compatibility-engine. Pricing key: pricing-compatibility-standard.

features.buyer_summary: Maps your building assemblies spatially, giving you a live understanding of how every component fits together.
features.investor_summary: Spatial reasoning engine resolving assembly topology into navigable, query-able construction graphs.
features.engineering_summary: Assembly graph engine binding spatial coordinates to topology nodes. Resolves positional relationships via topology resolver module.
features.admin_summary: Registry mapping: feat-atlas-engine → cap-spatial-reasoning → node-atlas-engine. Pricing key: pricing-atlas-standard.

features.buyer_summary: Ensures every decision in your project is tracked, auditable, and compliant with your governance rules.
features.investor_summary: Deterministic governance layer providing immutable audit trails and contract-enforced decision accountability.
features.engineering_summary: Governance contract engine resolving audit rules against decision logs. Produces deterministic compliance attestations.
features.admin_summary: Registry mapping: feat-governance-audit → cap-deterministic-governance → node-governance-audit. Pricing key: pricing-governance-pro.

features.buyer_summary: AI-powered construction intelligence that analyzes your project data and surfaces actionable insights.
features.investor_summary: Construction reasoning engine combining material, spatial, and governance signals into unified decision intelligence.
features.engineering_summary: Reasoning pipeline aggregating signals from compatibility, spatial, and governance modules. Produces inference outputs via construction inference module.
features.admin_summary: Registry mapping: feat-construction-intelligence → cap-construction-reasoning → node-construction-intelligence. Pricing key: pricing-intelligence-pack.

features.buyer_summary: Automatically generates construction details from your configured assemblies, saving hours of manual drafting.
features.investor_summary: Automated detail production layer converting assembly configurations into distributable construction documents.
features.engineering_summary: Detail renderer consuming assembly graph outputs. Produces vector detail artifacts via output pipeline module.
features.admin_summary: Registry mapping: feat-detail-generator → cap-detail-generation → node-detail-generator. Pricing key: pricing-detail-standard.

features.buyer_summary: Enables real-time updates across your platform so every panel and view stays synchronized.
features.investor_summary: Event routing infrastructure providing deterministic signal propagation across all platform modules.
features.engineering_summary: Signal bus routing typed events between modules. Provides pub/sub semantics with ordered delivery guarantees.
features.admin_summary: Registry mapping: feat-signal-bus → cap-event-routing → node-signal-bus. Pricing key: pricing-signal-standard.

features.engineering_label: Shop Drawing Renderer / Document Output Module
features.buyer_summary: Produces fabrication-ready shop drawings directly from your configured assemblies.
features.investor_summary: Production document pipeline converting assembly configurations into fabrication-grade output documents.
features.engineering_summary: Shop drawing renderer consuming assembly graph and detail outputs. Produces dimensioned fabrication documents via document output module.
features.admin_summary: Registry mapping: feat-shop-drawing-engine → cap-shop-drawing-production → node-shop-drawing-engine. Pricing key: pricing-shop-drawing-pro.

features.buyer_summary: Speeds up complex operations by processing multiple tasks simultaneously across your platform.
features.investor_summary: Distributed execution layer enabling horizontal scaling of computation-intensive platform operations.
features.engineering_summary: Worker fleet managing parallel execution pools. Distributes computation tasks across available worker instances with load balancing.
features.admin_summary: Registry mapping: feat-worker-fleet → cap-parallel-execution → node-worker-fleet. Pricing key: pricing-worker-fleet-standard.
